blocked_claim: DEU is superior to native/baseline cosmology.
reason: No explicit evidence/Bayes-factor/model-selection stage has been run and booked.
required_unlock: Explicit evidence/model-selection design and execution with matched assumptions.

blocked_claim: Bayes factor, evidence ratio, or model-selection preference favors DEU.
reason: Current chains support descriptive posterior comparison only.
required_unlock: Evidence computation or agreed model-comparison criterion.

blocked_claim: TT_lite was part of the sampled production posterior.
reason: TT_lite was explicitly excluded from production/native sampled likelihoods and retained as diagnostic context.
required_unlock: A later sampler explicitly including TT_lite.

blocked_claim: Final publication-style cosmological claims are allowed.
reason: The project has a scoped internal report and comparison lock, not publication-level external validation.
required_unlock: Publication preflight, robustness suite, external data checks, and approved claim lock.

blocked_claim: The observed A_planck shift proves a physical effect.
reason: Shared-parameter shifts are descriptive posterior comparisons only.
required_unlock: Targeted physical interpretation and external robustness tests.
